title: trifolium affine
intro: Trifolium affine, also known as the slender clover, is a perennial plant species in the pea family (Fabaceae). This plant is used in traditional medicine due to its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and antioxidant activities. The health benefits of Trifolium affine include its ability to reduce inflammation, improve wound healing, and exhibit antimicrobial properties. In herbal preparations, the leaves and flowers of the plant are used to make teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be consumed to harness its medicinal properties.
